title: GW Approximation for Quasiparticle Energies Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: Sigma(r,r';w) = (i/2pi)*integral dw' G(r,r';w-w')*W(r,r';w');  E_QP = E_KS + <psi|Sigma(E_QP) - V_xc|psi>
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for GW Approximation for Quasiparticle Energies

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=200) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class BerkeleyGW, ABINIT, YAMBO; contour-deformation for self-energy provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
